caption: A news broadcast features a panel of men sitting at a long table in an official setting, with several Israeli flags positioned behind them. The man on the left wears a white button-down shirt, while the man in the center wears a dark suit and red tie. Another man is partially visible on the far left, wearing a dark suit. The man in the white shirt remains relatively still, while the man in the dark suit keeps his head bowed, looking down at the table. On-screen graphics include a banner with the text "FOREIGN NEWS" and a headline that reads "NUCLEAR PROGRAMME" followed by "ISRAEL EXPECTS I.A.E.A. TO GIVE IRAN CLEAR WARNING AHEAD". A red "SUBSCRIBE" button and a website link "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" are displayed at the bottom. The "plustv" logo appears in the upper corners. The scene remains static across the sequence, with only slight movements in the subjects' posture.
